description: Internal topology of the payment_processor gate template. Validates the charge request locally, calls the external payment provider with a bounded wait, and emits exactly one outcome per admission: payment_confirmed or payment_failed. Hand-written golden example for the GA (Gate Architect) verification stack — see GA_PLAN.md.

charge_request.description: A locally validated, provider-ready charge instruction

charge_rejected.description: Fact that the charge request failed local validation (malformed amount, expired token binding, unsupported currency)

provider_ok.description: Fact that the external provider authorised the charge

provider_declined.description: Fact that the external provider declined the charge, errored, or timed out past the bounded wait

ProviderEndpoint.description: External payment provider API — the round-trip this gate exists to bound

ValidateCharge.description: Local structural validation of the payment against the auth token before any external call

CallProvider.description: Bounded synchronous call to the external provider; window_ms is the provider wait budget and dominates the parent gate's timing

ConfirmPayment.description: Terminal step for the success branch — shapes the provider authorisation into the contract's payment_confirmed outcome

FailPayment.description: Terminal step for the failure branch — any single failure signal (local rejection OR provider decline) produces the contract's payment_failed outcome
